TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Cliff Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1995, byacing te 11 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pqwasan biru spat ŚĻīÁīö, Cliff Alexander sangka' mzyu mari pspung. 2010-2011 kawas Cliff Alexander sangka' Curie's krahu' pqwasan biru hlahuy. 12 byacing hiya ga sangka' cikay pspung. Alexander spi' mopuw pspung. maki Chicago (CPL) pspung, magal blaq balay śąźÁłĺ. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ¶~ ®li** alexan*er ńßja Ē…£a nő≤a p…£naw Ē mari Ē mis~…ēuw qanij, qutux s~…ēa pzjaŇč pkaki Ē taj ks~…ēka Ē. kawas~…ē te ****, ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč te ** ru ** rjax qu ńßint…£an nja, kinńßulan nja …£a illinois~…ē, ńßija …£a mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~…ēquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunő≤un kinwa…£iq nja, *** kunkin kin Ēs~…ēuw nja, ńßija …£a qutux nqu s~…ēpzjaŇč ő≤laq na ppzuj mari nő≤a. pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru s~…ēpat **, ¶~ ®li** alexan*er s~…ēaŇčka Ē mzju mari ps~…ēpuŇč. ****-**** kawas~…ē ¶~ ®li** alexan*er s~…ēaŇčka Ē ¶~ ®urie Ēs~…ē krańßu Ē pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru ńßlańßuj. ** ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč ńßija …£a s~…ēaŇčka Ē ¶~ ®ikaj ps~…ēpuŇč. alexan*er s~…ēpi Ē mopuw ps~…ēpuŇč. maki ¶~ ®ńßi ¶~ ®a…£o ( ¶~ ®pl) ps~…ēpuŇč, ma…£al ő≤laq ő≤alaj **. kinő≤lajqan pin ¶~ ®juwa…£an s~…ēa qnxan nija Ē ps~…ēpŇčan mari s~…ēa maj ju…£al ja ¶~ ®iŇč ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē lis~…ēts~…ē o* national ő≤as~…ēkető≤all as~…ēs~…ēo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ē
S.FORM: Cliff Alexander hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa pzyang pkaki' tay kska'. kawas te 1995, byacing te 11 ru 16 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga Illinois, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 206 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 111 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. pqwasan biru spat ŚĻīÁīö, Cliff Alexander sangka' mzyu mari pspung. 2010-2011 kawas Cliff Alexander sangka' Curie's krahu' pqwasan biru hlahuy. 12 byacing hiya ga sangka' cikay pspung. Alexander spi' mopuw pspung. maki Chicago (CPL) pspung, magal blaq balay śąźÁłĺ. kinblayqan pincyuwagan sa qnxan niya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
